items.question: What technologies do you specialize in?

answer.text: I specialize in modern web development technologies including React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and cloud platforms like AWS and Vercel. I also have experience with databases like PostgreSQL and MongoDB.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?

answer.text: Project timelines vary based on complexity and scope. A simple website might take 2-4 weeks, while a full web application can take 8-12 weeks or more. I always provide detailed project timelines during the planning phase.

items.question: Do you work with teams or solo?

answer.text: I'm comfortable working both independently and as part of a team. I have experience collaborating with designers, other developers, and stakeholders using tools like Slack, GitHub, and project management platforms.

title.text: Common questions about my work and process
